response: Rewrite a business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL. In 2002, [Agent Name] & [Team Name] at [Brokerage Name] was established by [Agent Name] as an organization offering real estate agency expertise for both sellers and buyers in commercial and residential properties. The company targets homeowners and business owners as a trusted advisor for clients in all aspects of real estate and financing, with the goal of maintaining relationships for a lifetime. [Agent Name] and the team serve the following locations: Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona, Lancaster Park, and the broader Central Florida region. The business is operated by a small team of real estate experts.
